nodes.label: KHD 3 Ohm / 5 W driver (the actuator, de-housed from SK473)
nodes.rationale: 12 KHD 3 Ohm/5 W drivers de-housed from the 6 SK473 boxes (2 each) are THE actuators — mass-y, punchy, factory-matched to the PAM8403, 3 Ohm safe at felt level. Driver diameter Ø52mm. Heavy 3 Ohm KHD drivers may prefer ~80-160 Hz pulse.

nodes.label: Vantec NBA-200U USB 7.1 audio adapter (CM6206)
nodes.rationale: Vantec NBA-200U, SKU 080325, CM6206 chipset, 4 stereo 3.5mm jacks = 8 ch each; 3 owned, 2 used (V1 = ch 1-8, V2 = ch 9-12), V3 spare. CM6206 cards enumerate with same name and reorder across reboots — bind by /dev/snd/by-id.

nodes.label: SK473 PAM8403 stereo amp board (6 used = 12 channels)
nodes.rationale: IPSG SK473 6W powered speaker, SKU 593038, gutted for its PAM8403 board + 2 KHD drivers; 6 used = 12 channels, the binding constraint. Each box's single 3.5 mm jack is stereo = 2 independent channels (L=driver A, R=driver B); USB is shared 5 V power only.

nodes.label: Bill of materials (as-purchased)
nodes.rationale: As-purchased BOM reconciled to MicroCenter receipt 195-PO-419168, 2026-06-19 Santa Clara; SKUs, qty, spares, channel accounting.

nodes.label: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K (cordless Mode B power)
nodes.rationale: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K (24000mAh, 140W, 2x USB-C + 1x USB-A), SKU 549246; cordless Mode B amp power, amps split 3/2/2 across ports.

nodes.label: IPSG 10-port USB hub, 10A/50W AC adapter (wall Mode A power)
nodes.rationale: IPSG USB-A 3.0 10-port hub with 10A (50W) AC adapter, SKU 885194; wall-mode (Mode A) amp power, 50W far exceeds real peak ~2-3 W.

nodes.label: LEO SALES 40mm speakers (spare actuators)
nodes.rationale: 24 LEO SALES 40mm speakers (3W 4-pack SKU 714816 x3 and 2W 6-pack SKU 714808 x2) were the original fret-zone/string actuators, now spares since the KHD drivers are used instead.

nodes.label: AudioVox 18 AWG speaker wire (the only body wire)
nodes.rationale: AudioVox 18 AWG speaker wire, 100 ft, SKU 995381; the only body wire on hand plus Mode B power bus. Its weight tears unrelieved solder joints.

nodes.label: Raspberry Pi 5 (owned, cut from critical path)
nodes.rationale: Raspberry Pi 5 8GB, SKU 635649, owned but cut from the critical path — the laptop is the brain. ESP32 (Elegoo, 5 owned) is not in the audio path, sensor work only.

hyperedges.label: Dual power modes: wall hub (Mode A) and Anker cordless (Mode B)
